description: Benchmark CVEs for testing the MOAK-Lite pipeline. These are well-known KEVs with public information.

cves.name: Log4Shell
cves.notes: Apache Log4j JNDI injection. Trivially exploitable.

cves.name: Apache Path Traversal
cves.notes: Apache HTTP Server 2.4.49 path traversal and RCE.

cves.name: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset
cves.notes: HTTP/2 protocol vulnerability affecting multiple servers.

cves.name: MOVEit SQLi
cves.notes: MOVEit Transfer SQL injection leading to RCE.

cves.name: XZ Utils Backdoor
cves.notes: Supply chain backdoor in XZ Utils. Complex exploitation chain.
